title: symphyotrichum falcatum var. commutatum
intro: Symphyotrichum falcatum var. commutatum, also known as the prairie dock, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the prairies of North America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of prairie dock include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and relieving respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Prairie dock can be prepared through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and sore throats.
